name: Shashikant Giri
HeadLine: Web Developer & Data Analyst | Next.js, React.js, Node.js, MongoDB | Power BI, Python, SQL, Excel | Building Data-Driven Web Applications | Open to Opportunities
Info: Recent B.Sc. Information Technology graduate with hands-on experience in Web Development and Data Analytics. Skilled in designing and developing responsive web applications using React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB, along with analyzing business data using Python, SQL, Excel, and Power BI. Experienced in building full-stack applications, interactive dashboards, and data-driven solutions that transform raw data into actionable insights. Passionate about combining modern web technologies and analytics to create scalable digital products that solve real-world business challenges. Currently seeking entry-level opportunities in Web Development, Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, and Data-Driven Software Development.
Mission: To bridge the gap between technology and data by developing intelligent, scalable, and user-focused digital solutions. My goal is to leverage web development and data analytics to help organizations make informed decisions, improve efficiency, and deliver impactful user experiences.
Career_Objective: To begin my professional career as a Web Developer or Data Analyst where I can apply my technical, analytical, and problem-solving skills to create innovative solutions while continuously growing as a technology professional.

webDev_projects.name: Getmychap---fund-raising-website
webDev_projects.description: Developed a crowdfunding web platform that enables users to support fundraising campaigns through a modern and responsive interface. Implemented campaign presentation, donation workflows, and mobile-friendly design using modern web technologies.

webDev_projects.description: Built a personal link aggregation platform that allows users to organize and share multiple social media and website links through a single customizable profile page.

webDev_projects.description: Developed a URL shortening web application using Next.js and MongoDB, allowing users to generate and manage shortened links through a responsive user interface.

webDev_projects.description: Created a task management application that enables users to add, update, complete, and delete daily tasks. Designed an intuitive interface to improve productivity and task organization.

webDev_projects.name: PassOP
webDev_projects.description: Developed a password management application that securely stores and manages user credentials. Implemented CRUD operations and a user-friendly interface for efficient password organization.

webDev_projects.name: Twitter(X.com)
webDev_projects.description: Built a responsive Twitter (X) inspired social media interface featuring post feeds, profile layouts, and interactive UI components to replicate a modern social networking experience.

webDev_projects.name: Bootstrap_portfolio
webDev_projects.description: Designed and developed a professional personal portfolio website using Bootstrap to showcase technical skills, projects, certifications, and contact information.

webDev_projects.name: Bookoe
webDev_projects.description: Developed an online book discovery platform that allows users to explore and browse books through a clean and responsive user interface designed for an enhanced reading experience.

webDev_projects.name: Tiktok game
webDev_projects.description: Contributed to the development of an interactive browser-based gaming experience featuring engaging gameplay mechanics, responsive design, and optimized user interaction.

dataAnalysis_projects.name: Hospital performance dashboard
dataAnalysis_projects.description: Designed and developed an interactive Power BI dashboard to analyze hospital performance metrics including patient satisfaction, average waiting time, readmission rates, and operational efficiency. Created KPI visualizations and actionable insights to support data-driven decision making.

dataAnalysis_projects.name: University Student Performance Analytics
dataAnalysis_projects.description: Built a Power BI dashboard to evaluate student academic performance by analyzing attendance, examination scores, and graduation trends. Developed interactive visualizations and KPI tracking to identify performance patterns and support educational decision-making.

dataAnalysis_projects.name: Website Traffic Analysis
dataAnalysis_projects.description: Performed website traffic analysis using Excel to examine visitor behavior, traffic sources, and engagement metrics. Applied data cleaning, analysis, and visualization techniques to answer business-focused analytical questions and generate actionable insights.
